title: API: libpod system prune endpoint lacks complete documentation
body: ### Feature request description The current API docs lack important details. Consider the `system prune` API endpoint: What is the `POST` payload? Are there URL or query parameters? What are they? ### Suggest potential solution I can eventually figure this out by reading the Go source code, but this should really be in the docs. ### Have you considered any alternatives? Reading at the Go source code 😄 ### Additional context _No response_

comments.body: well there are a couple of things at play: knowing there is an endpoint that is wrong; and then fixing it.  I'm not sure we knew about this one.  Care to submit a PR?
I'm going to change the title to reflect this one if you are ok with that.
@baude All endpoints are broken, this is a general issue. At some point the swagger we generate lost just all payload information for whatever reasons.

With the latest swagger fixes we now see the payloads correctly again: https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#tag/system/operation/SystemPing
This however only shows the 200 return value and not the parameter that the endpoint accepts so this still has to be added manually.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
